editorial_note: APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS. All five sources reviewed; the four reachable snapshots (The Robot Report, Global Times x2, TechNode) verify every claim attributed to them verbatim, including the 18,000/62,500 shipment figures, the 68.1bn-yuan Q1 2026 financing, the six standard-system sections, and the 2026-edition standard framework. The headline 10,000-unit deployment + 100-plus applications target, the 'entering work mode' quote, the Tuesday June 10 MIIT/SASAC joint directive, the end-of-June/end-of-November timeline, and the Shao Hao (Vivo) quote all trace to the SCMP source, which returned HTTP 404 because the cited URL slug contains an extraneous '-into-' segment. The real article was verified live at the corrected URL and independently corroborated by Caixin Global and eWeek. Single recoverable defect (broken source URL) documented in the corrections record. MIIT/SASAC spelled and expanded correctly; no orphan URLs; dropped non-allowlisted specifics (named provinces, per-province/SOE scenario minimums, RaaS, Xpeng caption) genuinely absent.
